en.text: a primitive root; also denominative from H6718 to lie alongside (i.e. in wait); by implication, to catch an animal (figuratively, men); to victual (for a journey)

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; also denominative from H6718 to lie alongside (i.e. in wait); by implication, to catch an animal (figuratively, men); to victual (for a journey)
